🌿🐓 STOCK THE FREEZER WITH FARM-FRESH CHICKEN 🐓🌿
From our family farm to your dinner table — pasture-raised chicken available now at Roswell Family Farm!
✨ Current Cuts Available:
• Chicken Breast — $6.90/lb
• Thighs — $4.25/lb
• Drumsticks — $3.50/lb
• Whole Chickens — $3.90/lb
Perfect for grilling, meal prep, soups, or stocking the freezer! We only have a few whole chickens available, so grab them while they last. 🐔
Message us to order or reserve yours today!
📍 Roswell Family Farm
#RoswellFamilyFarm #FarmFreshChicken #PastureRaised #ShopLocal #FreezerFill #FarmToTable

🚜Meet us at the Farmers Market! 🐓🐖
📌Dolgeville - Plowe Park 
⏰9-1! 

Come and see us! 😍

Peep the duckling Willow wants to bring home! 🥰

Did Memorial Day weekend creep up on anyone else?? 🤪
Haven’t even planned what to eat this weekend?
We’ve got you covered! 🍗
Chicken leg quarters, thighs, drumsticks — we’ve got it all! 🙂
Plus PORK CUTS! 🥓
We’ll be at the Dolgeville Farmers Market this Saturday from 9–1!
If you’d like anything special, send us a message to reserve your order for market pick-up!
